pages.text:
Buying guide
BONDHOLMEN
Outdoor Living Furniture Series


A tribute to handicraft and common sense
How can we make your life at home more comfortable with knowledge of how people
lived in the past? One way is to be inspired by traditional handicraft. Like designers
Tina Christensen and Kai Legaard when they created BONDHOLMEN. Every detail
in the series is a tribute to common sense from past times. It's many small things
together that make the modern outdoor life a little easier and more sustainable.

Durable material with natural feel
All products in the BONDHOLMEN series are made of high-quality, sustainably
sourced eucalyptus. Eucalyptus is a durable, hard wood type suitable for outdoor
use since it is compact and has a naturally high oil content that helps protect against
weather and wind, drying out and mold. The brown-colored surface in several layers
makes all pieces even more durable for outdoor use and also makes them blend into
the outdoor surroundings.


com. For more detailed product information, see the price tag or visit

A place in the shade. The hole in the middle of the table top       Room for four. The round shape of the table makes it great
keeps your umbrella in place. The legs can easily be folded in to        for socializing since everyone can see each other. To make
make the table easier to store.                                      the chair with armrest as comfortable as possible for you, we
                                                              designed it with generous proportions for both the seat and theThis combination with JÄRPÖN/DUVHOLMEN Chair pads,                                                                armrests so they provide good support. The seat has a smallanthracite 995.512.34                                                         edge at the back to keep a chair cushion in place.

Protecting and caring for BONDHOLMEN


The best way to extend the life of your wooden outdoor furniture       Storing
is by cleaning it regularly, not leaving it outdoors unprotected               If possible, store your outdoor furniture in a cool and dry place
more than necessary and to restain it on a regular basis.               indoors. If the furniture is left outdoors, make sure to protect it
                                                                   with a waterproof cover and if possible tilt the furniture to make
Cleaning                                                                                               it easier for any water to drain away. After a rain or snowfall,
Wipe clean with a soft cloth dampened in water and a mild           wipe off excess water or snow from flat surfaces. Allow air to
soapy solution. Wipe dry with a clean and dry cloth.                      circulate to avoid condensation.

Maintenance
To prevent the surface from drying out and cracking, and
moisture from penetrating into the wood, we recommend you
restain the furniture on a regular basis, for example once a year.
How often you will need to do this will depend on how exposed
the furniture is to the elements.
For furniture that stands in the open air, a good indication that
you need to restain is if raindrops are absorbed directly into the
wood and no longer form small beads on the surface.


TOSTERÖ waterproof furniture covers         Storage boxes

                             Fits for example outdoor 2-seat corner sofas and a coffee
                           table, or loveseat together with an armchair and a coffee
                           table, with total max W865⁄8×L865⁄8×H331⁄2". Black
                  W865⁄8×L865⁄8×H331⁄2"               605.323.07

SERVICES


IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some
help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:


DELIVERY SERVICE                           TASKRABBIT ASSEMBLY SERVICE

Most of our products are designed and                   All IKEA products are designed to be
packaged so that you can take them                assembled by you, but you don't have
home yourself. If you prefer, we can                      to. We've partnered with TaskRabbit
arrange for delivery of your purchases                to connect you with a network of
directly to your home or business. Same             independent 'Taskers' who can provide
day, next day, or same week deliveries                quick and convenient assembly and
are available.                                  mounting services for your IKEA
                                                purchases made online and in stores.
                                             You can schedule assembly service
                                                         for as soon as the same day, with
                                                  the Tasker of your choice. Visit
                                                 TaskRabbit.com/IKEA or see a
                                                 co-worker for more details.


Services and prices may vary. For more information about our services, visit  or your local IKEA store.


Valid as of April 1, 2024 posting. Prices and availability of products are subject to change
without notice. Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.

Buying guide
BONDHOLMEN
Outdoor Living Furniture Series


A tribute to handicraft and common sense
How can we make your life at home more comfortable with knowledge of how people
lived in the past? One way is to be inspired by traditional handicraft. Like designers
Tina Christensen and Kai Legaard when they created BONDHOLMEN. Every detail
in the series is a tribute to common sense from past times. It's many small things
together that make the modern outdoor life a little easier and more sustainable.

Durable material with natural feel
All products in the BONDHOLMEN series are made of high-quality, sustainably

use since it is compact and has a naturally high oil content that helps protect against
weather and wind, drying out and mold. The brown-colored surface in several layers
makes all pieces even more durable for outdoor use and also makes them blend into
the outdoor surroundings.

sections.text:
To prevent the surface from drying out and cracking, and
moisture from penetrating into the wood, we recommend you
restain the furniture on a regular basis, for example once a year.
How often you will need to do this will depend on how exposed
the furniture is to the elements.
For furniture that stands in the open air, a good indication that
you need to restain is if raindrops are absorbed directly into the
wood and no longer form small beads on the surface.

SERVICES


IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some
help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:
